chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 177 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.6,7 & 8 2. For orders on CMA No.1200/2022 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.1201/2022 12.05.2026 Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the applicant Learned counsel for the applicant states that this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
